goal: Detect stale local codex-cli installations after source updates and refresh the local binary.
assumptions: GitHub Actions uses cargo run and is not dependent on the user's stale ~/.cargo/bin binary.
Local terminal usage resolves codex-auto-fix and codex from ~/.cargo/bin.
A doctor command can make PATH and source freshness issues visible without mutating secrets or configuration.
risks: cargo install --force overwrites local codex and codex-auto-fix binaries.
CODEX_AGENT_COMMAND may be intentionally unset in a developer shell.
PATH can resolve to a different binary than the one currently running.
steps: Add a failing doctor JSON integration test.
Wire doctor into codex and codex-auto-fix.
Document the command and freshness constraint.
Run fmt, tests, clippy, and doctor verification.
